case_title: O'BRIEN KIERNAN INVESTMENT COMPANY, INC. vs. FOREMAN, CHRISTY et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT FOREMAN, CHRISTY ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES
PHOTOCOPY FOR PLAINTIFF O'BRIEN KIERNAN INVESTMENT COMPANY, INC.

JUDGE PRO TEM SCOTT WEAVER - RPT, MARILYN NORMAN - CLERK, GUY DECKER C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. PL. PRESENT W/JANNA SPERRING AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIPULATED JUDGMENT UNDER FOLLOWING TERMS - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 691 O'FARRELL, #310, S.F, CA. - WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 11-23-96, 5PM - DEF. TO PAY $995 RENT PL. TO RETAIN $495 SECURITY DEPOSIT - RENTAL LEASE FORFEITED PREMISES TO BE LEFT IN CLEAN CONDITION - MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS - PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FOREMAN, CHRISTY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 691 O'FARRELL, #310, S.F, CA. $995.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $995.00, LEASE FORFEITED, DEF. FORF. TO PL. HER $495 SECURITY DEPOSIT.
